_comment: Opportunity: Ancient Battlefield Opportunity. Per opportunity directive: the engine continuously asks 'what opportunities naturally exist at a location that has existed for 10000 years?'. Discoverable by cultivation (Core Formation), perception (Nascent Soul (to perceive treasures among death-qi)), and luck (modifier 1.0). Prime Directive: opportunity exists objectively; player perception determines whether they find it.
name: Ancient Battlefield Opportunity
description: An ancient battlefield saturated with death-qi and fallen cultivator treasures. Exists because: ancient wars killed millions; their treasures remain.
perception_required: Nascent Soul (to perceive treasures among death-qi)
why_untaken: Death-qi corrupts; requires cultivation to survive.
natural_next_event: Death-qi disperses over millennia; beasts claim the battlefield.

simulation_notes.continuous_inference: The World State Engine continuously infers opportunities at every location based on the location's age, type, and history.
simulation_notes.no_locked_upgrades: A cultivator who later reaches the required perception will find opportunities they previously missed; the opportunities do not disappear.
simulation_notes.canon_fidelity: This is how Wang Lin found inheritances throughout his journey — the opportunities existed before he arrived; his perception determined what he found.

karmic_weight.description: No specific karmic consequence recorded in canon
